body:
This PR:
- adds effective radius to radiative diagnostics. It is set to zero outside of clouds, so it only really makes sense to look at instantaneous output. This is meant to help with debugging. If we need a monthly mean output we should weigh it by the cloud fraction (?)
- allows for effective radius to be set by CloudMicrophysics.jl diagnostics module. For now I am setting it to constant 14um for liquid and 25 um for ice. I'l add the variable functions next, once I set up the amip simulation pipeline and take a look at the biases.

It needs the most recent CloudMicrophysics and ClimaParams to work
title: Prescribe effective radius, add to diagnostics output

body:
Suggested by @dennisYatunin, this PR switches to using `LazyBroadcast`'s `lazy` function, instead of the `@lazy` macro.

The main benefit is that functions are much simpler to understand than macros, which are capable of doing syntactic transformations and more.
title: Use lazy broadcast function instead of macro
